title: Add baptism date field to Contact post type
body:
## Summary

We need to track the date a contact was baptized. Add a `baptism_date` date field to the Contact post type.

## Requirements

- Field type: `date`
- Field key: `baptism_date`
- Display name: "Baptism Date"
- Show in the milestone tile on the Contact detail page
- Field should be filterable via `list_posts()` date range queries
- Empty value should display as blank (not an error)
- Label must use the `disciple_tools` text domain

## Files likely affected

- `dt-contacts/contacts-post-type.php` — register field via `dt_custom_fields_settings`
- `dt-contacts/contacts.php` — add field to the milestone tile template

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] PHP lint passes with no errors on modified files
- [ ] PHPCS reports no violations
- [ ] PHPUnit multisite suite passes
- [ ] `baptism_date` appears in Contact detail view milestone tile
- [ ] Date value can be set and retrieved via `DT_Posts::update_post()` and `DT_Posts::get_post()`
